content:
Despite using [skip ci] it still built all the environments and some of them failed because the environments have changed so they don't build anymore, so it does not seem to work.

Dear Mike

Where did you get [skip ci]? I know that [skip appveyor] and [skip travis] work.
I do not know if [skip ci] is implemented.

https://reflectoring.io/skip-ci-build/
Ok it exists but it not copacetic with git and there are some issues running it.
Read further down here

https://reflectoring.io/skip-ci-build/#using-a-git-diff-in-the-ci-build
I don't know if this would help, but possibly.

On 4/7/2021 2:01 AM, oplaydo wrote:

[skip ci] [skip appveyor]

Adding to mnt151-frontend2 branch
This topic was moved here from #general > skip ci by Alec Leamas.
